output.reward: Safe passage and restoration of the facility power grid

boss.name: The Clockwork Heart
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Shutoff Core into the main processor port

encounters.trigger: Sabotaging the main steam valve forces the security alarm to alert the next sector
Stopping the assembly line overrides the security hatch to the central turbine
Overloading the primary generator forces the Clockwork Heart to emerge from the floor

output.objective: Disable the rogue Clockwork Heart before the facility undergoes a catastrophic steam explosion

boss.name: The Grand Architect
boss.victory_condition: Use the Overclocked Valve to overload his core, causing a permanent mechanical shutdown

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crawler retracts the barrier leading to the Gear Forge

encounters.hazard: Rotating gear floors that deal contact damage

pickup.effect: Forces machinery to operate at unstable, maximum capacity
pickup.name: Overclocked Valve

encounters.trigger: The sentinel's destruction powers the rusted lift to the Apex Chamber

pickup.effect: Temporarily slows the boss's reaction time
pickup.name: Core Stabilizer Key

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the automaton initiates the boss sequence for the Grand Architect

output.objective: Disable the city's central core to prevent a city-wide atmospheric collapse
output.reward: The blueprints to the Eternal Clockwork Engine and infinite steam pressure

boss.name: The Grand Automat-Archivist
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the master clock core to cease all mechanical hostilities.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the beetle unlocks the ventilation gate leading to the next zone.
Stopping the snail reveals a hidden pressure plate to access the Spire.
Clipping the sparrow's wings exposes the master controller for the final confrontation.
